r1_turnover.scenario_scan: Read the red threat arrow and green outlet lane before choosing.
r1_turnover.scenario_text: Ball lost at halfway. #10 is turning. Gap behind your CB.

choices.label: Sprint to close down #10 before he can turn
choices.tradeoff: High risk — win the ball back or get bypassed entirely
choices.outcome: You flew at #10 — he slips the pass wide. Your CB is scrambling.

choices.label: Drop between the lines and offer a safe outlet to recycle
choices.tradeoff: Controlled — slows the counter but stabilizes shape
choices.outcome: You show for the ball, shield, and play back to the CB. Tempo resets.

choices.label: Step across #10 and take the tactical foul
choices.tradeoff: Stops the attack — yellow card risk, crowd turns hostile
choices.outcome: Whistle. Yellow. Their free kick is 30 yards out. You stopped the break but the crowd erupts.

r1_loose_ball.scenario_scan: Red zone marks the duel. Green shows where to redirect if you win it.
r1_loose_ball.scenario_text: Long ball drops between you and their #8. Both arriving at speed.

choices.label: Go up hard — shoulder challenge and win the second ball
choices.tradeoff: Physical edge — foul or clean win, no middle ground
choices.outcome: You fly in — ball ricochets forward. Scramble continues.

choices.label: Cushion the header to your full-back and reset shape
choices.tradeoff: Controlled — concedes ground but keeps possession
choices.outcome: Soft touch back. Shape holds. Tempo drops.

choices.label: Pull out of the duel — let the CB deal with it
choices.tradeoff: Avoids contact — invites pressure and looks passive
choices.outcome: You hesitate. Their #8 wins it clean. Crowd groans.

r1_coach_scream.scenario_headline: COACH SCREAMING — Ball at your feet
r1_coach_scream.scenario_scan: Red arrows = pressing mids closing. Green = quick release lane.
r1_coach_scream.scenario_text: Ball arrives under pressure. Coach is screaming your name from the sideline.

choices.label: One-touch release to the winger before the press arrives
choices.tradeoff: Fast execution — turnover if touch is heavy
choices.outcome: Clean first-time pass. Winger away. Coach stops screaming.

choices.label: Shield, scan, and turn out of the double team
choices.tradeoff: Composed — needs calm under noise, slower
choices.outcome: You roll the defender. Space opens ahead.

choices.label: Hold the ball and gesture at the coach to calm down
choices.tradeoff: Emotional — breaks focus and invites the press
choices.outcome: You lose the ball while arguing. Stadium erupts.

r1_wide_overlap.scenario_scan: Green arrow = diagonal through the half-space. Red = closing CB.
r1_wide_overlap.scenario_text: Full-back overlaps. Half-space is open but their CB is stepping.

choices.label: Drive into the half-space and draw the CB
choices.tradeoff: High upside — attracts fouls or creates a 2v1
choices.outcome: CB commits. Overlap is free. Attack building.

choices.label: Clip the early diagonal to the overlapping full-back
choices.tradeoff: Precise — interception kills the move instantly
choices.outcome: Diagonal finds the run. Cross incoming.

choices.label: Check back and recycle — the overlap isn't on
choices.tradeoff: Safe — kills momentum but keeps the ball
choices.outcome: You slow it down. Overlap was open — teammate frustrated.

r1_goal_kick_press.scenario_headline: HIGH LINE — Press the goal kick
r1_goal_kick_press.scenario_scan: Red = their outlet. Green = where to cut the passing lane.
r1_goal_kick_press.scenario_text: Your line is high. Their keeper looks long. You're the trigger.

choices.label: Sprint to cut the passing lane as the keeper shapes to kick
choices.tradeoff: Coordinated press — mistimed and you're caught out
choices.outcome: Lane cut. Forced long. Midfield battles for the second ball.

choices.label: Hold the line with the back four — don't jump early
choices.tradeoff: Disciplined — gives them a free long ball window
choices.outcome: Shape holds. Long ball headed clear. Reset.

choices.label: Dive in on the keeper before the rest of the line moves
choices.tradeoff: Impatient — leaves a massive gap behind you
choices.outcome: Keeper clips it over you. Striker through. Goal.

r1_second_ball.scenario_scan: Red zone = where it will drop. Green = flick-on target if you win the header.
r1_second_ball.scenario_text: Clearance hangs in the air. You, their #6, and the ball are converging.

choices.label: Attack the header — flick on to your #10 running through
choices.tradeoff: High reward link play — mistime it and they're breaking
choices.outcome: Clean flick. #10 spins. Attack building central.

choices.label: Body the opponent and let it drop to your feet
choices.tradeoff: Controlled — slower but you keep possession
choices.outcome: You shield, ball drops soft. Shape resets.

choices.label: Pull off the duel — let the CB head it clear
choices.tradeoff: Avoids contact — concedes midfield and looks timid
choices.outcome: You bail. They win the second ball. Counter loading.

r1_channel_run.scenario_headline: CHANNEL RUN — Striker driving at you
r1_channel_run.scenario_scan: Red arrow = their run line. Green = angle to delay without diving in.
r1_channel_run.scenario_text: Their #9 receives and drives the channel. You're the last shield.

choices.label: Delay the run — jockey and force them wide
choices.tradeoff: Disciplined defending — buys time for cover
choices.outcome: You delay perfectly. Full-back recovers. Attack slowed.

choices.label: Step in early — win the ball before they enter the box
choices.tradeoff: Aggressive — clean tackle or foul in a dangerous area
choices.outcome: You clip their ankle. Free kick edge of the box.

choices.label: Stand off and guess the cut — commit when they shift
choices.tradeoff: Reactive — beaten easily if you guess wrong
choices.outcome: Wrong read. #9 cuts inside. Shot deflected in.

r1_throw_in.scenario_scan: Green = short option to feet. Red = their press closing the line.
r1_throw_in.scenario_text: Throw-in to you on the touchline. Crowd noise spikes. Press is coming.

choices.label: Chest it down and play quick to the overlapping full-back
choices.tradeoff: Fast restart — heavy touch and you're trapped
choices.outcome: Soft chest, one touch wide. Press beaten.

choices.label: Nod it back to the CB and reset the shape
choices.tradeoff: Safe — kills momentum but keeps possession
choices.outcome: Simple nod back. Team settles. Crowd booing fades.

choices.label: Panic — try a blind flick over the press
choices.tradeoff: Showy under noise — turnover if misread
choices.outcome: Flick intercepted. They're in behind within two passes.

r2_after_press.scenario_scan: Track the red zone toward goal. You're the last midfielder back.
r2_after_press.scenario_text: Press was late. Winger free behind the full-back. Down 1.

choices.label: Sprint to cut the cross lane — trust the keeper
choices.tradeoff: Physically demanding — covers the danger zone if timed right
choices.outcome: You slide across and block the cut-back. Corner kick. Breathing room.

choices.label: Hold the line and scream for an offside trap
choices.tradeoff: Relies on the back line syncing — high coordination requirement
choices.outcome: The trap fails. Goal. Your shout was a second too late.

choices.label: Stop running and gesture at the full-back for not tracking
choices.tradeoff: Emotional release — leaves the team exposed
choices.outcome: While you argue, the cross finds their striker. Goal. Coach is screaming your name.

r2_after_recycle.scenario_scan: Green arrow = switch opportunity. Red = central press closing.
r2_after_recycle.scenario_text: Possession reset. Huge gap on the weak side — window closing.

choices.label: Direct the CB to switch play to the weak-side winger
choices.tradeoff: High upside — requires precise long pass under pressure
choices.outcome: The switch beats the press. Winger is 1v1. Momentum is yours.

choices.label: Keep circulating through the middle — don't force it
choices.tradeoff: Low risk — burns clock but may miss the window
choices.outcome: Safe passes. The gap closes. Opportunity gone but possession kept.

choices.label: Take the ball yourself and drive into the packed midfield
choices.tradeoff: Showboating impulse — crowd wants action but three players close you
choices.outcome: Turnover. Counter coming straight back at you.

r2_after_foul.scenario_scan: Hostile crowd pulsing. Find the green leadership lane or hide.
r2_after_foul.scenario_text: Still rattled from the foul. Teammates waiting for your signal.

choices.label: Call for the ball and give a loud 'next play' verbal reset
choices.tradeoff: Leadership move — refocuses you and the unit under noise
choices.outcome: 'Next play!' The midfield responds. You receive under pressure and turn clean.

choices.label: Stay on the fringe — let others handle this phase
choices.tradeoff: Avoids another mistake — signals low confidence to teammates
choices.outcome: Your winger shrugs. The attack stalls without your link play.

choices.label: Fly into the next challenge to 'make up' for the foul
choices.tradeoff: Redemption impulse — second yellow is on the table
choices.outcome: Late challenge. Second yellow. You're off. Team plays a man down.

r3_final.scenario_scan: Two red zones closing. Green split lane is narrow — decide fast.
r3_final.scenario_text: Match on the line. One read defines the outcome.

choices.label: Thread a split pass between two pressing midfielders
choices.tradeoff: Match-winning if completed — interception ends the game
choices.outcome: The pass splits them. Striker through on goal. The bench explodes.

choices.label: Carry forward into the half-space and draw the foul
choices.tradeoff: Smart game management if ahead — less upside if chasing
choices.outcome: You carry, absorbs contact, wins the free kick. Clock bleeds.

choices.label: Blast it long and hope — get rid of the pressure
choices.tradeoff: Instant relief — surrenders possession and structure
choices.outcome: Hoofed long. Their keeper collects. Final attack coming.

r3_final_lead.scenario_scan: Green = safe recycle lane. Red = foul trap if you rush.
r3_final_lead.scenario_text: Up 1-0. They're throwing bodies forward. One mistake kills it.

choices.label: Circulate back to the CB — make them come again
choices.tradeoff: Game management — burns clock, invites pressure
choices.outcome: Patient recycle. Clock ticks. Final whistle soon.

choices.label: Carry into space and draw the foul — professional foul option
choices.tradeoff: Smart if ahead — card risk if mistimed
choices.outcome: Contact drawn. Free kick. Crowd frustrated.

choices.label: Boot it long — just get it out of danger
choices.tradeoff: Relief now — gives them one more attack
choices.outcome: Clearance falls to their midfielder. Last surge coming.

r3_final_counter.scenario_scan: Green = through ball lane. Red = recovering defender closing.
r3_final_counter.scenario_text: You win it. 3v2. Striker peeling left. Decision in two touches.

choices.label: Slide the through ball into the striker's path
choices.tradeoff: Match-defining — perfect weight or offside/ intercepted
choices.outcome: Ball weighted perfectly. Striker in behind — 1v1 with the keeper.

choices.label: Drive forward yourself — commit the last defender
choices.tradeoff: Draws foul or opens the pass — greedy if crowded
choices.outcome: Defender commits. Wide runner is free — square ball incoming.

choices.label: Slow down and hold — let them recover shape
choices.tradeoff: Cautious — kills the counter advantage
choices.outcome: You hesitate. Recovery sprint closes the gap. Chance gone.
